if.test: cancel_start_date != null and cancel_start_date != '' and cancel_end_date != null and cancel_end_date != ''
search_type != null and search_type != '' and search_text != null and search_text != ''

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND cancel_yn = 'Y'

${pagingTop} SELECT homepage_id, locker_number, request_number, member_id, member_name, cancel_yn, cancel_reason, cancel_id, cancel_ip, TO_CHAR(cancel_date,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS cancel_date FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND cancel_yn = 'Y'
ORDER BY request_number DESC ${pagingBottom}

SELECT homepage_id, locker_number, request_number, member_id, member_name, cancel_yn, cancel_reason, cancel_id, cancel_ip, TO_CHAR(cancel_date,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS cancel_date FROM UNTACT_BOOK_RESERVATION WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND cancel_yn = 'Y'
ORDER BY request_number DESC
